body.title: [awaiting_validation] Re-run home-wide sweep — prove dev-artifacts live only in the UU store
body.description:
**Problem:** The decision's measurement signal is Akien's acceptance test: 'I can't find any dev artifacts anymore except in devlab/runtime/memory/.' This ticket runs that proof after absorb+freeze+delete and records the result — it is the close-the-loop measurement for D-all-generations-consolidation.
**Proposed shape:** GATED on T-delete-dead-bulk-outright. Run the Akien grep — `(slate|ticket|decision|session|proof|rule) x (md|json|txt)` under `~/` minus the exempt-by-default set (uu_home() runtime, ~/.claude harness, ~/.unseen_university/akien, ~/TheIgorsProject freeze, .git, credentials) — and assert it returns empty outside devlab/runtime/memory/. Capture `du -sh ~` delta (~17G expected) and the store counts (decisions ~231, sessions non-empty). Record numbers in the close.
**Affected files:** none (read-only proof). Writes a proof/note recording the result.
**Design rules:** this is the measurement-signal proof for the decision; one-home invariant (CLAUDE.md); proof-on-close (this IS the proof ticket — its red form is 'sweep finds artifacts outside the store').
**Scope boundary:** IN — run the sweep, assert clean outside store + frozen freeze home, record du delta + counts. OUT — fixing any stray the sweep finds (that re-opens the relevant absorb/freeze ticket; this ticket only measures).
**Test plan:** (1) The home-wide artifact grep returns 0 hits outside devlab/runtime/memory/ and ~/TheIgorsProject (the freeze home, which is allowed to hold frozen copies). (2) `du -sh ~` shows the ~17G reduction vs the pre-consolidation baseline. (3) decisions/ ~231, sessions/ non-empty. (4) If any stray is found, it is logged and the owning ticket re-opened — this ticket closes only when the sweep is clean.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: PROVEN NOW: (a) artifact-completeness — 0 decisions/tickets/slates missing across ALL gen-dirs incl ~/.unseen_university (comprehensive exact-id pre-flight; caught+absorbed 4 stragglers the Haiku sweeps missed); UU decisions 116->233, slates 69->87, architecture 9->15. (b) du -sh ~ 42G->26G (~16.7G reclaimed). (c) exempt/live set intact. NOT YET: strict 'no artifact .md anywhere outside the store' — historical-source .md still sit in TheIgors.archive/lab pending the code-ref-gated freeze/removal (T-repoint-igor-refs-finish-gen-dir-consolidation carries the final clean-sweep). shipped-unproven: partial proof recorded; final sweep gated on the remnant-dir removal.
body.no_commit_reason: partial: absorb-complete + 16.7G proven; final sweep in follow-up
